---
title: "Architecture Series"
subtitle: "Customer-facing architecture explainers for core UIAO concepts"
doc-type: landing
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
aspirational: true
---

::: {.callout-important title="Content pending"}
This section is part of the customer-documents skeleton but has not yet been
authored. The page slugs below are reserved; content will land in line with
the [Customer Documents Roadmap](../ROADMAP.qmd). Until then, consult canon
at `src/uiao/canon/` for the authoritative source.
:::

The Architecture Series presents core UIAO architectural concepts in a form
suitable for authorizing officials, assessors, and technical leads who need
to understand the model without reading the full canon.

## Planned pages

| Slug | Topic | Canon anchor |
|---|---|---|
| `boundary-impact-model.md` | Authorization-boundary impact of UIAO overlay placement | `docs/docs/authorization-boundary.qmd` |
| `drift-engine.md` | Five-class drift taxonomy and detection flow | `docs/docs/16_DriftDetectionStandard.qmd` |
| `evidence-chain.md` | Provenance chain from telemetry to OSCAL evidence | `docs/docs/15_ProvenanceProfile.qmd` |
| `six-plane-architecture.md` | Identity / Addressing / Overlay / Telemetry / Management / Governance | `docs/docs/01_UnifiedArchitecture.qmd` |
| `three-layer-rule-model.md` | Canon → policy → enforcement layering | `src/uiao/rules/` |
